message:
refactor: style cleanup and test improvements for marking, scheduler, and cap-obligation suites

marking.rs:
- Use point-free u32::saturating_add in region_pending fold.
- Reformat total_pending method chain for readability.

three_lane.rs:
- Add test schedule_cancel_on_current_local_removes_local_ready
  verifying that scheduling a cancel via the current-local path
  removes the task from local_ready and promotes it to the cancel lane.

cap_obligation_compile_fail.rs:
- Hoist assert_subset helper, WebCaps/GrpcCaps/BackgroundCaps type
  aliases, and TokenKind import to module level to eliminate
  per-test duplication and improve readability.
- Reorder imports alphabetically (rustfmt compliance).

property_cap_obligation.rs:
- Replace manual indexing loop with idiomatic iterator
  (resolve_commit.iter().take(n_arms).copied()).
- Reformat long generic turbofish lines for readability.
- Hoist narrow() helper and use CapSet constructor instead of
  Default::default() in ambient_authority test.
- Reformat multi-statement closure arms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
